SELECT dsytfysheet.sqrq,
       dsytfysheet.sccj,

       dsytfysheet.hyd,
       dsytfysheet.fktt,

       dsytfy.hgjldw,
       dsytfy.cz,
       dsytfy.ytje,
       dsytfy.ywry,
       dsytfy.cgry,

SELECT fysqsheet.sid,
       fysqsheet.hklx,
       fysqsheet.seje,
       fysq.hbdm,

       fysq.csmc,

ORDER BY fysqsheet.sid ASC
